title: TERRALITH:ERA
description: Extinct creatures like dinosaurs, alive again!
body:
Terralith: Waking the Ancient Era of Minecraft

The idea behind Terralith is to bring to light the rich history of a forgotten Minecraft past. Inspired by the unique aesthetic of the Sniffer, the project aims to populate the world with mysterious and powerful creatures that once dominated the land.

The proposal goes beyond simply adding new mobs, dividing them into fascinating categories that enrich the game's exploration and narrative:

Dinosaurs: Colossal and predatory beasts that once dominated the game's ecosystem.
- Pusher
- Looker
- Heysser

Ice age era: coming soon

Hybrid: coming soon

Magical Creatures: Ancestral entities with fantastic powers, whose bodies are inspired by the singular shape of the Sniffer.
- Thunder Horse

Terralith not only adds new challenges but also enriches the game's lore, allowing players to discover the secrets of an ancient past. With these new inhabitants, the world of Minecraft becomes more vast, dangerous, and intriguing than ever before.
